name: Cheddar, Ham and Broccoli Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 small bunch broccoli, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni in a large pot of boiling water according to package directions.
2. Stir in broccoli and cook for 2 minutes before the end of cooking.
3. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a large, deep, nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add onion and ham; cook, stirring, until onion has softened, about 2 minutes.
5. Add garlic; season with salt and pepper.
6. Drain pasta and broccoli, reserving 1/4 cup water. Toss in a bowl with the ham mixture and cheddar cheese.
7. Add 3 tablespoons water, more if needed.
